NIS2 Self-Assessment Tool

Free Assessment

NIS2 Compliance
Self-Assessment

Answer 12 questions to find out if NIS2 applies to your organization, gauge your readiness, and get a prioritized action plan.

Start Assessment

How it works

Three steps, five minutes, actionable results.

Answer Questions

12 questions covering scope, governance, and technical controls.

Get Your Score

Instant maturity rating with a breakdown by compliance domain.

See Priority Actions

Personalized recommendations you can act on today.

Assessment Questionnaire

Select the option that best describes your organization.

Your Results

Download your results

Enter your email to receive a detailed PDF summary.

We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe any time.
